---
title: git
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE
)
```


******************************************************************************************

#### install


```sh
# check which version
git --version

# check commit history
git log

# check status
git status

# checkout onto a branch
git checkout [branch-name]

# clone a repo via https
git clone https://github.com/USERNAME/REPOSITORY.git

# Check it was cloned successfully:
git remote --verbose

# commit a change
git add foo.txt
git commit --message "A commit message"

# install Git
brew install git

# make a branch
git branch [branch-name]
git checkout [branch-name]

# merge a branch
# E.g. merge into master:
git checkout master
git merge [branch-name]

# osxkeychain helper
git credential-osxkeychain

# Tell Git to use osxkeychain helper:
git config --global credential.helper osxkeychain

# stash changes
# E.g. when pulling conflicting changes:
git stash
git pull
git stash pop
```
